alerts.title: System Alerts
alerts.subtitle: Monitor critical notifications and system warnings
alerts.detailedDescription: This alert was generated based on real-time monitoring of field conditions. Field supervisors have been notified and should take appropriate action.
alerts.highHumidityMessage: Humidity levels above 75% may reduce crystal growth in pans A2-A5
alerts.optimalSalinityMessage: Brine salinity in optimal range for pans B1-B3. Continue evaporation.
alerts.harvestReadyMessage: Pan C4 has reached maturity. Ready for collection.
alerts.tempFluctuationMessage: Unusual temperature variations detected in sector D
